changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fm058_location ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, version BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), created_by_id BIGINT, updated_by_id BIGINT, latitude DOUBLE PRECISION, longitude DOUBLE PRECISION, location VARCHAR(1000) );

changeSet.author: codex
codex
codex
